class.name: JustAMCPServer
class.brief_description: The core Model Context Protocol (MCP) server managing SSE transmission internally globally.
class.description: Wraps external streams safely handling JSON RPC negotiation natively. Emits core binding signals mapping Elicitation completions gracefully handling Editor integrations safely natively.

signal.name: elicitation_completed
signal.description: Standard mapped native execution pipeline resolving internal bounds tracking structurally securely!

signal.name: request_cancelled
signal.description: Standard mapped native execution pipeline resolving internal bounds tracking structurally securely!

signal.name: server_status_changed
signal.description: Standard mapped native execution pipeline resolving internal bounds tracking structurally securely!

signal.name: tool_requested
signal.description: Standard mapped native execution pipeline resolving internal bounds tracking structurally securely!
